channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: 'Tens of millions of Graviton cores': AWS scores huge coup as Meta 'buys' hundreds of thousands of CPUs and infrastructure, confirming Jeff Bezos' hyperscaler as the essential backbone of the agentic AI Era in a major blow to AMD and Intel ambitions
item.description: Meta expands its AWS partnership by renting tens of millions of Graviton cores, signaling a shift toward infrastructure over direct hardware ownership.

item.title: Samsung’s Galaxy Book 6 Ultra is made for creative pros
item.description: Samsung Galaxy Book 6 Ultra packs premium specs for creators. See if it can compete with the MacBook Pro.

item.title: Definitely not your usual EV: China begins sea trial for world's largest electric ship — Ning Yuan Dian Kun is longer than a football field, weighs 10,000 tons, and uses 10 container batteries with a total 19MWh capacity
item.description: A Chinese electric cargo ship with 19 megawatt hours of batteries is completing trials, combining large-scale energy storage and automation.

item.title: All the evidence revealed so far in Musk v. Altman
item.description: The Musk v. Altman trial is underway, and that means exhibits, or the evidence to be presented in court, are being revealed piece by piece. So far, email exchanges, photos, and corporate documents are circulating from the earliest days of OpenAI - and from before the AI lab even had a name. Some high-level takeaways: […]

item.title: This Eye-Catching Indoor Garden Is 20 Percent Off Right Now
item.description: Lettuce Grow's Farmstand is sure to impress, and it's 20 percent off for Mother's Day.

item.title: Spirited away? Airline, internet react to airlines possible closure
item.description: A major airline is on the precipice as Spirit Airlines stares down bankruptcy.

item.title: Friendster has returned! But you can only connect with offline friends.
item.description: Friendster has been relaunched roughly 24 years after it first debuted as one of the first social networking websites.

item.title: The Next Alzheimer’s Breakthrough Will Take More Than Just Science
item.description: At WIRED Health, pioneering Alzheimer's researcher John Hardy outlined the stakes—and next steps—of where treatment is headed next.

item.title: There's already a way to mount your smartphone to a Steam Controller
item.description: Just don't expect it to work with many iOS or Android apps yet.

item.title: AI will be Spider-Man’s only friend in ‘Brand New Day.’ The internet is losing its mind over it
item.description: The film’s director said Peter Parker’s new AI assistant E.V. will be all the superhero has for company—and social media isn’t happy to hear it. Since the massive success of Spider-Man: No Way Home in 2021, fans have been eagerly awaiting the next Peter Parker-centered film in the Marvel Cinematic Universe. Five years later, the fourth MCU Spider-Man film, subtitled Brand New Day, is finally coming to theaters—but a reveal in the screenplay’s first page has some fans abandoning the hype train. ...

item.title: Birdfy’s smart bird feeder is down to its best-ever price for Mother’s Day
item.description: From crafting machines to smart calendars, a number of unique gifts are already on sale in the run-up to Mother’s Day, May 10th. Birdfy smart feeders are another discounted option to consider, particularly the new Birdfy Feeder Metal 2 (4K), which is on sale for $259.99 ($50 off). If you’re looking to spend less, you […]

item.title: Coatue has a plan to buy up land for data centers, possibly for Anthropic
item.description: Coatue, one of the biggest names in venture capital, has a new venture that is reportedly buying land near large power sources.

item.title: 'An accomplished smart speaker that ticks a lot of the right boxes' — the Echo Show 11 falls to a record-low price at Amazon
item.description: The Echo Show 11 is the largest smart home display from Amazon and it's dropped to a record-low price right now.

item.title: Spirit’s collapse could hit overnight and your next trip is on the line
item.description: Travelers could face cancellations, rebooking chaos, and higher last-minute fares Spirit Airlines looks like it’s getting spirited away.

item.title: Ariane 6 marque un retour historique : l’Europe peut-elle rattraper SpaceX ?
item.description: Après une crise historique qui l'a privée de tout accès indépendant à l'espace, l'Europe engage une transformation profonde de son modèle spatial. Entre la montée en puissance opérationnelle d'Ariane 6 et l'émergence d'une nouvelle génération de lanceurs privés, l'Agence spatiale...
